name: ScaleOps
description: ScaleOps 提供自动实时管理和重新分配计算资源的软件，优化 Kubernetes 集群以应对 AI 计算需求。
description_en: ScaleOps builds software that automatically manages and reallocates computing resources in real-time for Kubernetes efficiency amid AI demand.
why_matters: 获 Insight Partners 领投 $130M C 轮，估值 $800M，针对 AI 需求自动优化计算资源分配，是基础设施领域的关键玩家。
why_matters_en: Raises $130M Series C at $800M valuation led by Insight Partners, focusing on real-time computing resource optimization for AI workloads in Kubernetes.

name: Qodo
description: Qodo 构建 AI 代理用于代码审查、测试和治理，针对 AI 编码规模化验证需求。
description_en: Qodo builds AI agents for code review, testing, and governance as AI coding scales.
why_matters: 纽约初创公司获 Qumra Capital 领投 $70M B 轮，总融资 $120M，下注代码验证将成为 AI 编码下一阶段核心。
why_matters_en: NY-based startup raises $70M Series B led by Qumra Capital, total $120M, betting on code verification as the next phase of AI-driven software development.

name: Rebellions
description: Rebellions 是韩国无晶圆厂 AI 芯片初创公司，筹备 IPO。
description_en: Rebellions is a South Korean fabless AI chip startup preparing for IPO.
why_matters: 继 C 轮后追加 $400M 融资，估值 $2.3B，由 Mirae Asset 和韩国国家成长基金领投，即将 IPO。
why_matters_en: $400M pre-IPO raise at $2.3B valuation led by Mirae Asset and Korea National Growth Fund, following recent Series C.

name: Sycamore
description: 帮助企业构建、安全和编排AI代理的初创公司，由前Coatue合伙人创立。
description_en: Startup helping enterprises build, secure, and orchestrate AI agents, founded by former Coatue partner.
why_matters: 前Coatue合伙人创立，种子轮即获Coatue和Lightspeed领投6500万美元，天使包括前OpenAI首席科学家Bob McGrew和Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan，显示顶级人脉和企业AI代理赛道强势背书。
why_matters_en: Founded by ex-Coatue partner, $65M seed led by Coatue/Lightspeed with angels like ex-OpenAI CSO Bob McGrew and Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan, signaling elite network and strong enterprise AI agent momentum.
latest_news: 2026-03-30: 宣布6500万美元种子轮融资

name: Cognichip
